brief_notes: Novel RIFT+MEG paradigm with excellent quantitative presentation. Tables include eye movement statistics with t-values, p-values, and Cohen's d; RIFT sensor identification; coherence values with cluster-based permutation; position-dependent coherence profile; individual differences correlation; and carefully controlled stimulus properties. The participant exclusion pipeline is transparent (36 recruited, 34 analyzed, 29 with RIFT). Source localization to BA18 is specific. The null result during target fixation strengthens the parafoveal interpretation.
